blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 105 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 32°F, winds around 26 mph.
Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 38°F.
